## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes with 0 errors
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @meitheal/tests test` passes
- [ ] New behavior has corresponding tests
- [ ] KCS docs updated if behavior changed (same commit)
- [ ] No cross-context deep imports (use public package APIs)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format with emoji prefix
- [ ] HA add-on compatibility preserved (if touching `meitheal-hub/`)
